name: obs-studio
description: OBS Studio streaming/recording control — scenes, sources, studio mode, virtual camera.

prerequisites.name: go
prerequisites.install_hint: Install Go from https://go.dev/dl/ (needed to compile gobs-cli)
prerequisites.note: Only needed if installing via 'go install'. Pre-built binaries available at https://github.com/onyx-and-iris/gobs-cli/releases

install.notes: OBS Studio itself must be installed separately from https://obsproject.com/download

integration_test.description: OBS Studio must be running with obs-websocket enabled (bundled in OBS 28+)
